name: Lama Rod Owens
bio: Lama Rod Owens is a Tibetan Buddhist teacher, author, and activist. He is one of the few Black lamas in the Kagyu lineage, having completed a traditional three-year retreat under the guidance of Lama Norlha Rinpoche. His book 'Love and Rage' explores the intersection of Buddhist practice, radical self-care, and social justice.
